sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19309" key="banausourge/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰναυσουργ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n19309.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">follow a mere mechanical art,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
